description: Add 'i' key handler in TUI model for devcontainer creation - In wt/pkg/tui/model.go Update function around line 780-790 (where 'v' key creates workspace file), add case for 'i' key to call createDevcontainer(). Model this after the createWorkspaceFile pattern around line 1260. Implement createDevcontainer() tea.Cmd that calls devcontainer.CreateDevcontainer and returns success/error messages. Add devcontainerCreatedMsg and handle it in Update to refresh the view.
acceptance_criteria: Key handler for 'i' added in Update function
createDevcontainer function implemented following createWorkspaceFile pattern
devcontainerCreatedMsg type defined and handled in Update
Success message displayed after devcontainer creation
Errors are properly propagated and displayed

verification.value: Run TUI, navigate to project, press 'i', verify .devcontainer folder is created
